## XGT Dedicated Protocol Frame Structure

During communication using the XGT dedicated protocol, it includes an LSIS frame which includes MAC, IP header, TCP header and data for Ethernet communication.

The LSIS frame of XGT dedicated protocol contains Company Header, Command, Data Type, and Data.

### LSIS ID Structure

The LSIS network uses 2 LSIS (LS Industrial Systems) IDs. LSIS ID 1 is for operation of XGT and XGB series as a client. In case of operating as a server, LSIS ID requested by a client means the client should use LSIS ID 1 or LSIS ID 2.

The search results indicate that detailed frame format specifications, header structures, and binary protocol layouts are documented in the official LSIS user manuals, particularly in sections covering:
- XGT dedicated protocol header structure
- Header and data structure of XGT dedicated protocol
- Frame examples

For the complete technical specifications of the header format and binary frame protocol details, you would need to consult the full user manuals referenced in the search results, particularly the "User's Manual XGT FEnet" and related XGB/XGT documentation from LSIS.

## 찾은 주요 문서:

1. **XGT FEnet I/F Module 매뉴얼 (영문)** - LS Electric의 FEnet I/F module은 다양한 응용 통신 시스템을 가지고 있으며, 상세한 시스템 구성 및 설명은 Chapter 4를 참고할 수 있습니다.

2. **XGB FEnet I/F Module 매뉴얼 (한국어)** - XGB FEnet I/F모듈에서 지원하는 프로토콜은 XGT 전용, 모드버스 TCP/IP, 사용자 프레임 정의가 있습니다.

3. **XGT Ethernet 전용 프로토콜 통신 방법** - LS 산전 고유데이터(Header format), 명령어(Command), 데이터타입(Data Type), 데이터(Data)가 포함됩니다.

## 프로토콜 주요 특징:

XGT 전용 프로토콜은 LS 산전 FEnet I/F 모듈간에 통신을 하는 프로토콜이며, 명령어를 사용하여 읽기/쓰기가 가능하고 PC, HMI에서 XGT 전용 프로토콜을 이용하여 통신이 가능합니다. XGT 전용 통신은 TCP와 UDP 두 통신 방식으로 사용이 가능합니다.

FEnet 프로토콜은 TCP 및 UDP 기반 Channel로 통신 가능하며 기본적인 포트로 TCP는 2004, UDP는 2005를 사용합니다.

Based on the search results, I found information about the LS Electric XGT dedicated protocol specification for FEnet communication:

## XGT Dedicated Protocol Overview

The XGT dedicated protocol includes information on general specifications, frame structure, header structure, and instruction specifications, along with header and data structure details and frame examples.

## Protocol Structure

During communication using XGT dedicated protocol, it includes LSIS frame which includes MAC, IP header, TCP header and data for Ethernet communication. The LSIS own frame for data communication includes LSIS ID, instruction, data type, and data.

## Protocol Instructions

The XGT dedicated protocol uses 4 instructions, each instruction does Read/Write, Request/Response operations. In case of 'Individual', usable data types of each instruction are Bit, Byte, Word, DWord, LWord. But for 'Continuous', only Byte is usable.

## Key Services

Dedicated communication (server) service is a protocol of Ethernet module that can read and write information and data of PLC from PC and peripheral devices. Ethernet operates as a server in a communication network and responds to memory read or write requests from an external device or PC using the XGT protocol or Modbus TCP protocol.

TCP port 2004 and UDP port 2005 are used for XGT dedicated driver of Ethernet module.

The documentation for these specifications appears to be available in LS Electric's official user manuals for FEnet I/F modules such as the XBL-EMTA and XGB FEnet modules.

# VagabondK.Protocols Library Overview

This is a comprehensive .NET protocol library for industrial device communication. Here's what it provides:

## Core Components

**VagabondK.Protocols.Abstractions** handles abstract protocol types and logging functionality across all implementations.

**VagabondK.Protocols.Channels** delivers "communication channel related functions used by various protocols," implementing TCP/UDP socket-based channels and serial port support.

**VagabondK.Protocols.Modbus** enables "Modbus RTU, TCP, ASCII serialization functions" and supports both master and slave implementations across multiple channel types.

**VagabondK.Protocols.LSElectric** provides compatibility with LS ELECTRIC PLC products through Cnet and FEnet protocols, supporting both serial and network-based communication.

## Key Features

- Multi-protocol support (Modbus RTU/ASCII/TCP, Cnet, FEnet)
- Flexible channel architecture (TCP, UDP, Serial Port)
- Master/Slave implementations
- Comprehensive logging via channel loggers
- Variable endian handling for Modbus register operations
- Monitor functionality for continuous data tracking

## Usage Pattern

The library follows a consistent pattern: create a communication channel, instantiate a protocol client/service with a serializer, then execute read/write operations. Documentation and blog tutorials in Korean are available for detailed implementation guidance.

## XGT Dedicated Protocol Overview

XGT series dedicated protocol communication is function executing communication by the dedicated protocol, allowing users to configure the intended communication system between products without special setting by using reading/writing data of internal device area and monitoring function.

## Protocol Structure

The XGT dedicated protocol includes sections on frame structure, header structure, instruction types, and header and data structure. The protocol includes fields for frame direction, frame order number, length, position info, check sum, and command instruction in hexadecimal format.

## Data-Related Fields

The protocol specifies fields for number of blocks, length of variables, data address, data count (number of data), error status, block number, and data.

## XGT FEnet Protocol Frame Structure

During XGT dedicated protocol communication, the Ethernet communication includes LSIS frame which includes MAC, IP header, TCP header and data.

### LSIS Frame Components

The LSIS own frame for data communication includes LSIS ID, instruction, data type, and data.

### Protocol Instructions and Operations

The XGT dedicated protocol uses 4 instructions, each instruction does Read/Write and Request/Response operations. For 'Individual' operations, usable data types are Bit, Byte, Word, DWord, and LWord, but for 'Continuous' operations, only Byte is usable.

### FEnet I/F Module Identification

The FEnet I/F module is identified by Bit 0~3 representing the Slot No. and Bit 4~7 representing the Base No.

### Communication Methods

XGT dedicated communication is available in 2-ways communication method of TCP and UDP.

## XGT Protocol Overview

The XGT dedicated protocol supports 4 instructions, each performing Read/Write and Request/Response operations.

## Data Types

For 'Individual' instruction types, usable data types include Bit, Byte, Word, DWord, and LWord, while for 'Continuous' types, only Byte is usable.

## LSIS IDs

LS ELECTRIC networks use 2 LSIS IDs, where LSIS ID 1 is for operation of XGT and XGB series as a client. When operating as a server, the client should use LSIS ID 1 or LSIS ID 2.

## Protocol Frame Structure

The LSIS frame of the XGT dedicated protocol includes Company Header, Command, Data Type, and Data fields.

## 검색 결과 종합

XGT FEnet 프로토콜의 공식 LS Electric 문서를 찾았습니다. 현재 접근 가능한 정보를 정리하면:

### 발견된 주요 문서

**공식 LS Electric 출처:**
- [XGT FEnet I/F Module User's Manual V2.30](https://www.ls-electric.com/upload/customer/download/f8a96bfb-6212-4a0f-8d07-a1ba8868240f/User's%20Manual_XGT%20FEnet_V2.30.pdf)
- [XGL-EFMTB T8 Manual V3.2 (한국어)](https://sol.ls-electric.com/uploads/document/16401342439630/XGL-EFMTB_T8_Manual_V3.2_202011_KR.pdf)
- [XGL-EFMTB T8 Manual V3.2 (영문)](https://sol.ls-electric.com/uploads/document/16411765512530/XGL-EFMTB_T8_Manual_V3.2_202011_EN.pdf)
- [XGB FEnet I/F Module User's Manual XBL-EMTA V1.8](https://sol.ls-electric.com/uploads/document/17006058395450/User_s+Manual_XBL-EMTA_ENG_V1.8_202210.pdf)

### XGT FEnet 프로토콜 주요 특징

**통신 채널:**
- TCP 포트: 2004
- UDP 포트: 2005

**프레임 구조:**
- LSIS 프레임: Company Header, Command, Data Type, Data
- 4개의 기본 명령어 지원 (각각 Read/Write, Request/Response)

**데이터 타입:**
- **Individual 모드**: Bit, Byte, Word, DWord, LWord 지원
- **Continuous 모드**: Byte만 지원

**프로토콜 레이어:**
- Ethernet 통신: MAC + IP Header + TCP/UDP Header + LSIS 프레임
- LSIS ID: 1 (클라이언트), 2 (서버)

### 프로토콜 상세 구조 (검색된 정보)

XGT 프로토콜은 다음 필드를 포함합니다:
- Frame Direction (요청: 0x33, 응답: 0x11)
- Frame Order Number
- Length (2 bytes)
- Position Info
- Checksum
- Command Instruction (2 bytes)
- Data Type (2 bytes)
- Reserved Area (2 bytes)
- Data

### 추가 리소스

**GitHub 구현 참고:**
- [Wireshark XGT Protocol Dissector](https://github.com/ciaoly/PLC-XGT-protocol-for-Wireshark) - xgb.lua에 프레임 구조 상세 정의
- [VagabondK.Protocols](https://github.com/Vagabond-K/VagabondK.Protocols) - .NET으로 구현된 Cnet/FEnet 프로토콜 라이브러리

**기술 문서:**
- [LSIS XGT Series User Manual Chapter 7](https://www.manualslib.com/manual/1494857/Lsis-Xgt-Series.html?page=77) - XGT Dedicated Protocol 상세
- [XGT Panel Communication](https://icdn.tradew.com/file/201606/1569362/pdf/7974402.pdf)

### 주의사항

공식 PDF들이 바이너리 형식으로 인해 직접 파싱에 어려움이 있습니다. 정확한 바이트 레벨 프로토콜 상세 정보(정확한 명령 코드, 전체 헤더 형식, 에러 코드 테이블)는 다음에서 확인 가능합니다:
1. LS Electric 공식 솔루션 포탈에서 최신 PDF 다운로드
2. Wireshark dissector (xgb.lua) 소스 코드에서 프레임 필드 정의 확인
3. VagabondK 라이브러리의 C# 구현에서 직렬화 구조 학습
